tasks.label: Flash Firmware (DFU)
tasks.command: command -v dfu-util >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'dfu-util not found. Install it first (brew install dfu-util).'; exit 1; }; [ -f build/TerrariumPolySynth.bin ] || { echo 'Missing build/TerrariumPolySynth.bin. Run Build Firmware first.'; exit 1; }; echo 'Put Daisy Seed into DFU mode (hold BOOT, tap RESET). Waiting for device... (Ctrl+C to cancel)'; until dfu-util -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '0483:df11'; do sleep 0.5; done; echo 'Device found. Flashing...'; dfu-util -a 0 -s 0x08000000:leave -D build/TerrariumPolySynth.bin -d ,0483:df11
